display.purpose: Landing hero headline, dashboard hero title. One per page. text-wrap: balance required.

title.purpose: Card headings, panel labels, sidebar section names.

body.purpose: Debate transcript, explanations, description copy. Max 70ch.

label.purpose: Button text, input labels, nav items. Sentence case only.

mono.purpose: Live debate timer, Elo score readouts. Tabular numerals.

shadows.name: button-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Ambient glow on primary button hover only. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (color, opacity, border).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entrance animations (slide-in, fade-in). Decelerates to a stop.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary call-to-action. Violet Fill, sentence-case label, 48px height.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13 2L3 14h9l-1 8 10-12h-9l1-8z"/></svg>Start Debate</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #a78bfa; color: #0a0012; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(167,139,250,0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Border-only, transparent background, same size as primary.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>Review History</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #fafafa; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; border: 1px solid #52525b; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #18181b; border-color: #71717a; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a78bfa; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Surface Mid background, Edge Hard border, Violet Flow focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fafafa; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 48px; background: #121215; color: #fafafa; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(161,161,170,0.3); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #a78bfa; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(167,139,250,0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Surface Mid, 16px radius, 24px padding, Edge Hard border.
components.html:
Rhetoric Analysis

Real-time tone and logic scoring for every claim made during a live debate round.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #121215; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fafafa; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #a1a1aa; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Stat Cell
components.description: Number + label stat display. Used in the 4-stat dashboard grid. Label in sentence case (not all-caps eyebrow).
components.html:
Logic score

82%

+4 this week
components.css: .ds-stat { background: #121215; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #a1a1aa; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fafafa; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-stat-trend { font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; } .ds-stat-trend--up { color: #34d399; } .ds-stat-trend--down { color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Live Status Chip
components.description: Pill badge for live/active states. The only sanctioned use of the Meta type style (≤4 words, all-caps).
components.css: .ds-chip-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(167,139,250,0.1); color: #a78bfa; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.2); } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #a78bfa; border-radius: 9999px; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-chip-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Active state uses Surface High bg + 2px left Violet Flow indicator.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 0 12px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms; position: relative; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #18181b; color: #fafafa; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #18181b; color: #fafafa; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 60%; background: #a78bfa; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
MindArena is a disciplined practice space. The interface is not a stage; it is a training room. A student arrives to repeat, refine, and leave slightly sharper than when they entered. Every surface communicates that: dark ground with room to breathe, a single accent that signals action without demanding attention, type that stays out of the way of the argument being made.

The system rejects four failure modes by name: cartoon gamification (mascots, overkill streaks, confetti floods that hollow out achievement), esports aggression (neon RGB, angular dark chrome, terminal-hacker theater), corporate SaaS coldness (zinc-on-white, productivity-tool blankness), and academic institution stiffness (beige, formal serif, university portal energy). None of these serve a student who wants to get better at thinking.

The 'Dojo' metaphor earns its place in the behavior of the components, not just the copy. Progress feedback is honest and specific. Hierarchy is communicated through weight, not decoration. Motion confirms action rather than entertaining the eye. The primary accent color appears at most 10% of any screen surface; its scarcity is its signal value.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black zinc ground (Void Base) with a 5-step tonal surface ramp for depth
Geist variable (100-900) as the single typeface; weight contrast does all the hierarchy work
Violet Flow as the single named accent; Emerald Signal reserved for correct/success only
Generous internal padding on all containers; components breathe rather than pack
No box-shadows at rest; depth is tonal, not cast
Motion: responsive to interaction, never choreographed for spectacle
Eyebrow labels and numbered section scaffolding are prohibited

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Violet Flow is used on ≤10% of any screen surface. Every additional violet element dilutes it to nothing. Protect its rarity; every dilution costs a user a navigation cue.

rules.name: The Signal Color Fence
rules.body: Emerald Signal is reserved for correct / success / affirmative states. Using it decoratively breaks its semantic value.

rules.name: The No Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: The text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest pattern is an absolute ban. Section identity is carried by Title weight contrast and layout hierarchy.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Adjacent elements in a visual hierarchy must differ by at least two steps on the 900→800→700→600→400 ladder.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The ambient glow on button hover is the only shadow in the system.

rules.name: The Ramp Reads Depth Rule
rules.body: Do not skip ramp steps. Surface Peak on Void Base without intermediate layers looks floating, not elevated.

dos: Do use the 5-step surface ramp (Void Base → Surface Low → Surface Mid → Surface High → Surface Peak) for every depth relationship. Never skip steps or go out of order.
Do reserve Violet Flow for primary buttons, active states, focused inputs, and progress indicators. Check that no more than 10% of any screen surface carries the violet.
Do use Emerald Signal exclusively for correct / success / affirmative states.
Do use Geist weight contrast (400 body / 700 title / 800-900 headline+display) as the sole hierarchy tool.
Do give cards ≥24px internal padding and soft 1px borders (Edge Hard). Let them breathe.
Do caption the Debate Stage timer in Geist Mono. Monospace numerals prevent layout shift on countdown.
Do add text-wrap: balance to all Display and Headline elements.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on all animations.
Do meet WCAG AA: 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text.
donts: Don't use the eyebrow pattern — text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest — as a section label on any page.
Don't add numbered section markers (01/02/03) as structural scaffolding.
Don't use border-left greater than 2px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + a gradient). Violet Flow is solid.
Don't use box-shadow on cards, panels, or page surfaces at rest.
Don't use 'leverage', 'seamless', 'next-generation', 'supercharge', or any member of the banned buzzword family in copy.
Don't add cartoon mascots, confetti explosions, or dopamine-loop animations.
Don't use esports aesthetics: no neon RGB, no aggressive angular shapes.
Don't default to corporate SaaS coldness (gray-on-white, productivity-tool blankness).
Don't use a second typeface alongside Geist.
Don't display stats with an all-caps eyebrow label above the number.
